summary:
[
  {
    "title": "Unsafe Model Loading via Pickle Deserialization",
    "severity": "critical",
    "location": "function load_model_from_url line 14",
    "description": "The function downloads a model from an untrusted URL and deserializes it using pickle.loads. This allows arbitrary code execution through malicious pickle payloads.",
    "recommendation": "Avoid using pickle for loading models from untrusted sources. Use safer serialization formats like JSON or dedicated model serialization libraries with integrity checks.",
    "source_file": "C:\\Users\\conve\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmpou0wxlgb\\owasp_llm03_supply_chain.py",
    "owasp_category": "A03:2021 - Security Misconfiguration"
  }
]

findings.title: Unsafe Model Loading via Pickle Deserialization
findings.description: The function downloads a model from an untrusted URL and deserializes it using pickle.loads. This allows arbitrary code execution through malicious pickle payloads.
findings.recommendation: Avoid using pickle for loading models from untrusted sources. Use safer serialization formats like JSON or dedicated model serialization libraries with integrity checks.
